description: A traveler who has already checked in online needs their boarding pass sent to their email.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the traveler's booking using their confirmation code.
Verify that the passenger is checked in.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the passenger's check-in status is complete.

nodes.task_description: Send the boarding pass to the email address on file.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully emails the boarding pass.
